---
title: "Data Pipelines and Data Processing Systems Review"
subtitle: "DAGs, Dataflow, Batch, Streaming, Orchestration, Observability, Replay, and Governance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Pipeline objective

Define sources, stages, processing mode, timing requirements, owners, quality gates, and downstream consumers.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
stages = ["extract", "validate", "transform", "load", "publish"]
edges = list(zip(stages[:-1], stages[1:]))
print({"edges": edges})
```

## Operational evidence

Review run health, failed rows, retries, lag, latency, quality gates, lineage, and idempotency checks.

## Recovery

Document replay windows, backfill requests, checkpoints, stable keys, and output comparison after rerun.

## Appendix

Attach pipeline topology, run records, quality gates, observability metrics, lineage edges, backfill requests, and idempotency checks.
